methods.description: Measurement of studied specimens using a digital caliper.

steps.description: The studied specimens were measured with a digital caliper 0-150 mm/0.01.
steps.searchable_summary: Measure physical specimens using a digital caliper.

steps.description: the measurements are reported in Online Resource 1.
steps.searchable_summary: Report or store measurements in a specified resource.
outputs: Reported measurements (e.g., a table or dataset in Online Resource 1)

methods.description: Acquisition of 3D models of selected specimens using structured blue LED light 3D scanners.

steps.description: Several of the studied specimens were acquired using the structured blue LED light 3D scanners Artec Eva and Artec Space Spider.
steps.searchable_summary: Acquire 3D models of specimens using structured light scanners.

steps.description: A selection of downloadable 3D models is available in Online Resource 2.
steps.searchable_summary: Make selected 3D models available for download in a specified resource.
outputs: Available 3D models (e.g., files in Online Resource 2)
